channel.title: Des on Scott Tao
channel.description: Recent content in Des on Scott Tao

item.title: About Me
item.description:
About Me with English

Sehenswürdigkeiten in China (Klick mich an☺️)

Persönliche Informationen

  • Name: Scott Tao
  • Beruf: iOS-Entwickler (2013 – heute)
  • Abschluss: Bachelor in Informatik und Technologie
  • Geburtsjahr: 1990
  • Addresse: Essen, Deutschland

  • Sprache:

    • Deutsch C1 (Ich lerne derzeit an IBZ Sprachschule)
    • Englisch: ★★★☆☆

  • Fähigkeiten:

    • Objective-C: ★★★★★
    • Swift: ★★★★☆
    • SwiftUI: ★★★☆☆
    • Golang: ★★★☆☆
    • Java: ★★★☆☆
    • Vue.js: ★★★☆☆

E-mail: baitong.tao@hotmail.com

Now

Jetzt lerne ich Deutsch C1 in IBZ Sprachschule in Essen. Weil ich etwa 6 Jahren Deutsch nicht gesprochen, konnte ich fast gar nicht Deutschland. So wiederhole ich jetzt Deutsch B1 bis C1.

Jetzt lerne ich Niveau C1, der Kurs beendet fast , so jetzt würde ich eine Arbeitsstelle in Deutschland suchen.

2020.12 - 04.2023

五岳归来不看山，黄山归来不看岳

“No mountain is more gorgeous than the Five Great Mountains until you pay a visit to Mount Huang.”

Facing reality, I had to start looking for a new job again.

After I started working for a multinational company, I had to communicate in English since many of my colleagues are abroad.

This experience has helped me adapt to Englisch-based work practices and learn more rigorous workflow standards. We frequently use online meetings and send emails to confirm work-related matters.

After completing my code, I request Code Review from my colleagues and submit Merge Request.

I’ve also learned various Git Commands, including git reset, git revert, git rebase and `` git discard`.

Life in Beijing has a fast pace, and the city’s size means that spending a lot of time commuting is the norm. My daily routine typically involves leaving home at 8 AM and returning at 9 PM. By the time I finish my evening routine, the day is over.

Additionally, I often work overtime until 11 PM or even midnight, and sometimes I work on weekends. This busy lifestyle has left me with little time for walking, running, or vacationing, resulting in a weight gain of 15 Kg.

Later, my colleagues and I decided to climb Mount Tai, one of the Five Great Mountains. We started our ascent at 11 PM and took five hours to reach the summit. During the climb, we talked a lot about the future, which brought up many thoughts and reflections.

However, when I stood atop Mount Tai, over 1,500 meters high, I felt like my life was just beginning. This experience made me realize the importance of making time for life.

So, I decided to move to Germany to find a job and start a new life.

01.2020

Because of the COVID-19, the company is closed. Because everyone is not allowed to go out, I can’t find a new job. Then I decided to do a project with my friends.

In this year, I learned Java, Golang and VUE, we did a project. Then use Docker to deploy in the Linux server.

Although I didn’t get a dood income, but I learned a lot in this year.

09.2018

After finishing my time in Germany, I returned to Beijing, China, and began a new chapter in my work life.

06.2018

From this year, I began to take the German certificate, TestDaf and DSH. My friend and I travel while taking exams. The Netherlands, France and Italy, also in Germany. Then I got the DSH2 certificate.

And at this time, I don’t want to continue to apply for the master. So in June, I returned to China, too.

I spent some time at home with my parents, and then went out to travel with friends.

10.2014 – 10.2016

While I was working, I wanted to improve myself, so I signed up for a weekend German language course. After thress months of studying, my interest in German grew, and I wanted to learn more about the world. This inspired me to plan a trip to Germany to study the language and explore ist culture.

On the first day of 2016, I send my personal documents to the APS (Academic Evaluation Centre) to prepare for the APS assessment. Over the next few months, I organiyed my university academic knowledge in English.

I’m glad that I passed APS test.

On October 5, 2016, I set foot on German soil for the first time, making the beginning of my journey in learning German.

On the morning of 5th October, I stepped on the land of Germany for the first time, started my German study at Ruhr University Bochum.

04.2014

After four months of training in iOS development, I began my professional career.

12.2013

Already a senior. In this year, I found that mobile development will become mainstream. And took a four months of iOS development training course in Beijing.

  • 2 weeks: C Language
  • 2 weeks: Objective-C Language
  • 2 weeks: UI and Controller
  • 1 weeks: Network Requests and Data Analysis (xml/json)
  • 3 weeks: Project practice (follow the teacher to do the project)
  • 4 weeks: Independent development
  • 1 weeks: Job fair

item.title: About
item.description:
About

If you want, you can click here go to the About Page with English.

**Willkommen auf meinem Blog👏🏻. **

Weil ich das Thema meines Blogs verändert habe, gab es nocheinige Probleme.

Und auch wegen meines Deutschlernens habe ich im Moment keine Zeit, um Blogartikel zu schreiben.

Wenn meine Leben stabiler wird, werde ich meine Blogs fortführen. Vielleicht werde ich das Thema auch auf Deutsch als zweiter fortführen..
